overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring a medieval lakeside village. The character walks through a settlement with thatched-roof huts and wooden structures, transitioning from the village center to a wooden dock extending over a calm lake under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village center with thatched huts

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the village, passing wooden huts and scaffolding

notable_agents.action: villager working on the ground near a wooden platform

entered.detail: traditional hut with straw roof and wooden walls
tall wooden structure with ladders and platforms
elevated wooden walkway in the village center
large open-sided barn with straw roof

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a medieval village composed of thatched-roof huts and wooden structures. The ground is a mix of dirt paths and wooden platforms, with moderate grass and vegetation. A villager works near a platform on the left as Geralt moves deeper into the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between village and lakeside

events.description: lake becomes visible in the distance as Geralt turns toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the waterfront, leaving the dense village center

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the dirt path

entered.detail: calm lake visible beyond the village buildings
wooden planks leading toward the water's edge

segments.scene_description: As Geralt moves toward the waterfront, the view opens to reveal a calm lake in the distance. The path transitions from the village center to the lakeside approach, with wooden dock structures becoming visible. Villagers can be seen walking along the paths.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over the lake

events.description: Geralt steps onto the wooden dock extending over the lake water

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the weathered wooden dock, approaching the end of the pier

notable_agents.action: villager bending over working with materials on the dock

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks extending over the water with barrels and posts
stacked wooden barrels on the dockside
small wooden boat moored at the dock edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks onto a wooden dock extending over the calm lake, surrounded by water on both sides. The dock features wooden barrels and a small rowboat. A villager works on the right side of the dock as Geralt continues to the end of the pier, with mountains visible in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval village that gradually opens up to a serene lakeside pier. It begins with Geralt walking through a settlement of thatched-roof huts and wooden structures, passing a villager working beside a dirt path. As he moves toward the waterfront, the dense village architecture gives way to an expansive view of a calm lake and emerging dock structures. The scene then shifts as Geralt steps onto a wooden dock surrounded by water, passing barrels and a small rowboat while a villager works nearby. Finally, the camera follows him to the end of the pier, where the horizon opens to reveal distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky.
